error_coordinates_out_of_range: Error: Coordinates are out of range or incorrectly ordered (Lat before Lng required).
invalid_format: Invalid format. Please use 'lat,lng,lat,lng' or 'lat lng lat lng'.
footer_text: © {year} Arnis v{version} by louis-e · Improved by Hadoiz
new_version_available: There's a new version available! Click here to download it.
world_in_use: The selected world is currently in use
area_too_large: This area is very large and could exceed typical computing limits.
area_extreme: This area is extremely large and may be too big to generate successfully.
area_extensive: The area is quite extensive and may take significant time and resources.
select_area_prompt: Select an area on the map using the tools.
world_preview_hint: 2D is the exact top-down render. 3D uses real block geometry from your Java world (drag to orbit, scroll to zoom). If the block model is unavailable or too large, the app falls back to a tilted 2D map.
world_preview_3d_no_map: Map image not loaded. Try closing and opening the preview again.
world_preview_3d_unavailable: 3D preview could not be loaded. This needs a Java world folder with metadata.json (generate once in Arnis). Bedrock worlds are not supported for 3D here.
world_preview_3d_fallback_map: Block model unavailable — showing the tilted map instead.
world_preview_3d_mesh_too_large: 3D model too large for the browser — showing the tilted map instead. Try a smaller selection.
